rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF VIRGINIA CAROLINE MARTINEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #12, REPORT, FEES
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues, in addition to prior hearing issues, to include: Conservators provide a statement for the equity line of credit showing all draws and payments; however, no information is provided on the purpose of the draws (which appears to total ~$95,000). A copy of the judgment against the contractor is attached, which shows that $770/month was to be paid for a total of $22,300, which Conservators allege has been paid in full and used towards payment on the line of credit; however, the equity line of credit statement provided shows only two payments of $770.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF TEOLA HOLMES MOSS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: continued to 12/24/18. no file stamped copy of the petition and no proposed order delivered to the examiner 3 court days before the hearing as required by local rule. in addition, the POS of the NOH was filed 10/5/18 claiming notice was mailed 10/6/18. It is not possible to state under penalty of perjury that notice WAS mailed on a date later than the date the document with that signature was filed. new notice must be sent no later than 12/9/18 in order to have this petition remain on calendar for 12/24/18. the new POS must be filed and the file stamped copy and proposed order delivered to this examiner in Room 202 no later than noon on Wednesday, 12/19/18 in order to avoid an automatic continuance.
